mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TF_TASK_STATUS_HISTORY( ID, TASK_ID, FROM_STATUS, TO_STATUS, CHANGED_BY, CHANGED_AT, MEMO ) VALUES( #{id}, #{taskId}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{changedBy}, #{changedAt}, #{memo} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TF_TASK_STATUS_HISTORY SET TASK_ID = #{taskId}, FROM_STATUS = #{fromStatus}, TO_STATUS = #{toStatus}, CHANGED_BY = #{changedBy}, CHANGED_AT = #{changedAt}, MEMO = #{memo} WHERE ID = #{id}
